title: Dismiss button too small and low contrast on alarm screen
description: The Dismiss button is 80x32dp dark gray on a black background. It's nearly invisible and too small to reliably tap, especially when the user is groggy and half-asleep. This is the most critical action on the screen.

PM.notes: Should-fix. Critical action too hard to hit.

Dev Lead.notes: Increase size and lighten color, <5 lines.

Security.notes: User safety — must be able to dismiss alarm reliably.
